texto: Robin Hood or my Robyn Hood - a legendary character known throughout the world. Why? Essentially the character is on the side of the poor, the oppressed, those who live in a society with very limited recourse to justice. Hence the attraction of an heroic figure who identifies with the poor and the needy and has the courage and ability to solve the problems. Often at the point of an arrow or sword? Why not. That gives the hero character an adventurous dimension to their actions.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de John Reynolds que provoca enfrentar incertezas com ação. Ao questionar “Robin Hood or my Robyn Hood - a legendary character known throughout the world. Why? Essentially …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, young-adult-fiction, character, com foco em termino e reflexao.
